extraction.one_line_summary: TEUNS Dylan stole victory from DENNIS Rohan who rode an exceptionally long time-trial effort up the steep Oron finish climb.
tactical_patterns: DENNIS Rohan went very long on steep hilltop finish, leveraging TT power rather than punchy acceleration tactics.
CAVAGNA Rémi attacked at 5km but Quick-Step isolated, could only manage 8-second gap before chase neutralized.
HAYTER Ethan crash at 14km forced Ineos into defensive race leadership rather than controlling finale with numbers.
MCNULTY Brandon initiated final climb attacks, UAE positioning early on steep gradient rather than waiting for sprint.

rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: positive: Won from chase group behind DENNIS, showing strong finishing punch after steep gradient
rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: positive: Took race lead via long-range TT power effort on steep finish, unconventional tactic worked for podium
rider_signals.HAYTER Ethan: negative: Crashed at 14km with race leader jersey, eliminated from finale contention completely
rider_signals.DE PLUS Laurens: positive: Did extensive pacemaking work for Ineos throughout stage, showing exceptional form and team commitment
rider_signals.CAVAGNA Rémi: neutral: Launched 5km solo attack but lacked Quick-Step support to sustain meaningful gap before climb
rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: neutral: First to attack final climb but lacked sustained power to hold off stronger finishers
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: positive: Finished in top group on steep hilltop, confirming climbing form without needing to attack
